roots.name: archive
roots.current_role: Current canonical target root for the source repository layout.

roots.name: artifacts
roots.current_role: Generated, ephemeral, or release-adjacent output root.
roots.proposed_target: generated evidence or release artifact review
roots.notes: Review before using as authority.
roots.exception_target: provenance/evidence policy review; possible release or archive evidence relocation
roots.exception_reason: Tracked toolchain-run provenance remains at repository root and requires release/evidence policy review before relocation or retirement.

roots.name: bundles
roots.current_role: Current content, data, pack, profile, or export-adjacent root retained until split review.
roots.notes: Authored bundles and generated exports require separate handling.
roots.exception_target: protected bundle ownership review before relocation; possible contracts/bundles, content bundle examples, release recipes, or tests only after bundle ID and lock semantics review
roots.exception_reason: Root bundles contain active bundle profile source referenced by XStack control tooling, skills, and bundle documentation.

roots.name: compat
roots.current_role: Current contract, schema, compatibility, or adjacent root retained until contract convergence.
roots.notes: Root-level compat/ remains mixed implementation and shim code after CONVERGE-06; do not move wholesale into contracts/.
roots.exception_target: protected compatibility split review: pure contracts to contracts/compatibility; implementation and shims only after runtime/tooling ownership review
roots.exception_reason: Active compatibility implementation, negotiation engines, migration/refusal helpers, and legacy shims are imported by client, server, runtime, tooling, and tests.

roots.name: content
roots.current_role: Current canonical target root for the source repository layout.
roots.notes: Authored packs, profiles, fixtures, datasets, assets, and domain data.

roots.name: contracts
roots.current_role: Current canonical target root for the source repository layout.
roots.notes: Machine-readable and prose contracts for schemas, registries, protocols, compatibility, stability, replay, ABI, repository, and distribution rules.

roots.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
roots.current_role: Allowed root-level project file.
roots.notes: Allowed root file.

roots.name: control
roots.current_role: Current runtime/AppShell/platform-adjacent root retained until runtime convergence.
roots.notes: Control substrate must preserve process-only mutation boundaries.
roots.exception_target: protected control ownership review: runtime-bound adapters to runtime/control, machine-readable control policy to contracts/control, docs to docs/control, tools/tests to their owning roots
roots.exception_reason: Active deterministic control gateway, IR, negotiation, fidelity, planning, capability, view, effect, and proof engines are imported by apps/client, game domains, net policies, tools, and XStack.

roots.name: core
roots.current_role: Current runtime/AppShell/platform-adjacent root retained until runtime convergence.
roots.notes: Core is likely mixed; do not move wholesale.
roots.exception_target: protected core ownership review: universal deterministic primitives to engine, domain-specific logic to game/domains, contracts to contracts, tooling/tests to their owning roots
roots.exception_reason: Active deterministic substrate helpers for constraints, flow, graph/routing, hazards, schedules, spatial transforms, and state machines are imported by game domains, tools, and XStack session runtime.

roots.name: data
roots.current_role: Current content, data, pack, profile, or export-adjacent root retained until split review.
roots.notes: Data contains registries, content, planning mirrors, and generated evidence; split by authority.
roots.exception_target: file-family split review across content/domain-data, content/packs, contracts/registries, docs, tests, release, archive/generated evidence, and runtime/release projection policy
roots.exception_reason: Data root remains a large mixed surface containing registries, authored pack declarations, world/domain data, planning mirrors, generated evidence, baselines, release/runtime data, and XStack metadata.

roots.name: dist
roots.current_role: Generated, ephemeral, or release-adjacent output root.
roots.proposed_target: generated distribution output; future distribution contract review
roots.notes: Distribution output is governed by distribution contracts, not source repo layout.
roots.exception_target: distribution projection policy review; release/source authority split
roots.exception_reason: Tracked distribution projection files remain at repository root and require release/provenance review before relocation or retirement.

roots.exception_reason: Active Python library implementation for install, instance, save, store, bundle, import/export, and artifact flows is imported by runtime, tools, and tests.
